Sir Marmaduke Thweng (or Tweng, Thwinge etc.), later 1st Baron Thweng, was an English knight from Yorkshire who fought in the Wars of Scottish Independence.[1]

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle於大約1225年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Robert de Thweng21歲，母親Maud of Kilton17歲。他於大約1250年與Lucy de Brus結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1284年之前在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特卡斯特萊頓，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle于大约1225年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Robert de Thweng21岁，母亲Maud of Kilton17岁。他于大约1250年与Lucy de Brus结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1284年之前在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特卡斯特萊頓，埋葬在英国越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thweng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place so called in East Yorkshire, named with Old Norse thvengr or Old English thweng ‘narrow strip of land’.
History: Martha Thwing (died 1774) is buried in the King's Chapel Burying Ground in Boston MA.

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle was born about 1225, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Thweng, was 21 and his mother, Maud of Kilton, was 17. He married Lucy de Brus about 1250. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. He died before 1284, in Castleton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle est né environ 1225, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Thweng, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Maud of Kilton, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Lucy de Brus environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé avant 1284, à Castleton, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle um 1225 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Thweng 21 und seine Mutter Maud of Kilton 17. Er hat um 1250 Lucy de Brus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb vor 1284 in Castleton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Lucy de Brus circa 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castleが約1225年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Thwengは21歳，母Maud of Kiltonは17歳であった。約1250年にLucy de Brusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1284年以前にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターカストレトンで死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Thweng(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud of Kilton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1250년 Lucy de Brus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1284년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 카스틀레턴에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Thweng, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Maud of Kilton, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucy de Brus aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1284, em Castleton, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Marmaduke de Thweng Lord of Kilton Castle родился около 1225 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Thweng было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Maud of Kilton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy de Brus около 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер перед 1284 г. в местности кастлетон, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.
